title: Delete Pending User Invitations
story: As a product administrator, I want to delete a pending invitation, so that I can revoke access before the invited user accepts and optionally notify them that the invitation has been cancelled.
description: Add the ability to delete pending invitations from the account management page. When an invitation is deleted, the accept token is invalidated so the link can no longer be used. A future enhancement would send a cancellation email to the invited user via a SendGrid template.
acceptance_criteria: Account owner can delete a pending invitation from the account management page
Deleted invitation links are invalidated and cannot be used
The pending invitation is removed from the account management UI
ux_changes: Delete button/action on pending invitations in the account management page.
middleware_changes: Delete invitation endpoint that invalidates the accept token and removes the pending invitation record.
implementation_notes: A cancellation notification email was discussed but deferred pending SendGrid template creation and content.
comment_summary: Developer implemented delete functionality for pending invitations and pushed to staging. Noted that a cancellation email template is needed for future enhancement.
